name: whatsapp-flows
description: Build, validate, audit and debug WhatsApp Flows JSON. Covers the full lifecycle from requirements gathering to validated delivery.

commands.name: interview
commands.description: Gather context before building — language, endpoint type, screens brief

commands.name: build
commands.description: Generate complete, valid Flow JSON from interview brief

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Score flow quality across structure, UX, errors, performance, best practices

commands.name: debug
commands.description: Diagnose broken or unexpected flow behavior
